notes: Factory injects rulesEngine + strategyTable. Returns { subscribe, dispatch, getState, getCurrentHintQuery, getDecisionLog }. Phases: betting -> player_turn -> dealer_turn -> resolved. Dispatch type 'deal' is accepted in BOTH 'betting' phase (starts a hand) AND in 'resolved'/'review' phase (begins a new hand) — this is the explicit fix for the S3.A5/S4.A3/S6.A3 critical user_flow. Decision log records every player action with playerHandSnapshot, dealerUpcard, chosenAction, correctAction (correctAction sourced from strategyTable.recommendation BEFORE the action is applied). Subscribe fires immediate snapshot to new subscribers and on every state mutation. Illegal dispatches are silent noops.

self_test_results.deal_from_betting: transitions to 'player_turn' with 2 player + 2 dealer cards (1 hidden)
self_test_results.deal_from_resolved: transitions through fresh hand to 'player_turn' (S3.A5/S4.A3 fix)
self_test_results.subscribe_fires_on_mutation: listener invoked once per accepted dispatch
self_test_results.decisionLog_correctAction_populated: every entry has correctAction set via strategyTable lookup BEFORE action applied
self_test_results.blackjack_immediate_resolve: natural 21 reveals dealer hole and resolves immediately
